depts.title: State Department Officer Access
depts.eb_desc: Handles electricity outages and power infrastructure complaints.
depts.water_desc: Manages public water supply, drainage, and sewage issues.
depts.corp_desc: Local administration for Chennai city infrastructure and services.
depts.municipality_desc: Urban local body services for districts and municipalities.
depts.transport_desc: Handles public transit, licensing, and road safety matters.
depts.pwd_desc: Infrastructure development and government building maintenance.
depts.health_desc: Public health services and medical institution management.
depts.police_desc: Law enforcement and public safety grievances.
depts.rural_desc: Infrastructure and welfare services for rural areas.
depts.revenue_desc: Land records, certificates, and taxation matters.

home.ai_desc: Our AI-powered system automatically identifies the correct government department and regional office for your specific issue.

status.title: Track Status
status.subtitle: Track Grievance Status
status.search_placeholder: Search by Complaint ID or Keyword
status.no_records_sub: Try adjusting your search or lodge a new grievance.

guidelines.title: Grievance Guidelines
guidelines.sec1_title: 1. Grievances Not Taken Up For Redress
guidelines.sec1_item1: Subjudice cases or any matter concerning judgment given by any court.
guidelines.sec1_item3: RTI matters (Use the dedicated RTI portal).
guidelines.sec1_item4: Anything that impacts territorial integrity of the country.
guidelines.sec1_item5: Suggestions (Please use MyGov platform for suggestions).
guidelines.sec2_desc: The portal utilizes an AI-assisted routing mechanism. Expected resolution times are as follows:
guidelines.sec3_item1: Ensure all submitted documents are legible.
guidelines.sec3_item2: Do not lodge duplicate grievances for the same issue.
guidelines.sec3_item3: Always note down your automatically generated Complaint ID.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: For technical issues with the portal or urgent queries, please contact the dedicated citizen helpdesk below.
contact.email_sub: Include your Complaint ID in the subject line.
contact.address_content: Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances, Sardar Patel Bhawan, Sansad Marg, New Delhi - 110001
